goal: Working MVP analytics app over R2 Data Catalog / R2 SQL with Workers AI features, assistant-ui + Agents SDK chat, dashboards, and a contractor/permit vetting tool.
scope: Quick-and-dirty but fully wired. No mock data. Reuse existing template primitives. Skip Stitch/Jules mockup ceremony; build React islands directly on the existing shadcn foundation.
rules: Never hand-edit worker-configuration.d.ts; run pnpm cf-typegen after binding changes.
Use Bindings: Env on Hono apps; never define interface Bindings.
All /api/* routes are zod-openapi typed; OpenAPI at /openapi.json, /scalar, /swagger.
Every service/view exposes /health and logs to the mirrored D1 logging layer.
Frontend in src/frontend/pages/; dark theme; shared header; mobile-responsive; sort+filter on tables; errors via ErrorLogger; shadcn Dialog instead of window.alert/confirm.
Auth via existing WORKER_API_KEY Secrets Store binding; no users table.
Lint/format = oxlint/oxfmt. Deploy only via pnpm run deploy.
No mock/placeholder data. If schema lacks support, make smallest reasonable choice and note it.

secrets.name: R2_SQL_TOKEN
secrets.scopes: R2 Storage (Admin Read & Write) + R2 Data Catalog (Read & Write) + R2 SQL (Read). Admin R&W on Storage is required even for read-only SQL during open beta.
secrets.note: User pastes at prompt. Never hardcode.

reuse_existing_template_primitives.ai: AI binding + AI Gateway (AI_GATEWAY_ID) + MODEL_* vars + workers-ai-provider
reuse_existing_template_primitives.data: D1 (DB) + drizzle-orm + drizzle-zod + mirrored logging layer

r2_sql_guardrails: Read-only: only SELECT / WITH / SHOW / DESCRIBE / EXPLAIN. Reject DML/DDL.
FROM uses namespace.table. Always ensure a LIMIT (default 500, max 10000).
No OFFSET (cursor-paginate with WHERE + ORDER BY).
No window functions (OVER). No func(DISTINCT ...) — use approx_distinct().
JOIN, subqueries, UNION/INTERSECT/EXCEPT, SELECT DISTINCT are supported.
EXPLAIN/SHOW/DESCRIBE are free — validate before running real queries.

status_protocol.instructions: Work in dependency order. Set in_progress when starting, done only when all acceptance items pass, blocked with a 'blocked_reason' if you cannot proceed. Commit per task with message referencing the id.

tasks.title: Bootstrap repo from template
tasks.description: Generate from the template (Use this template), corepack enable, pnpm install, baseline pnpm build + pnpm cf-typegen green. Read startup.md, AGENTS.md, and both skills.

tasks.title: Add R2 SQL secret + vars
tasks.description: Add R2_SQL_TOKEN secret; add R2_ACCOUNT_ID, R2_BUCKET, R2_WAREHOUSE, R2_CATALOG_URI, SODA_PERMITS_URL as vars in wrangler.jsonc. Run cf-typegen.

tasks.title: Introspect catalog + discover CSLB schema (GATE)
tasks.description: List namespaces and tables (return_details=true). Run R2 SQL DESCRIBE on the CSLB table and SELECT * LIMIT 5. Capture COUNT(*) and per-query metrics (files_scanned, bytes_scanned). Determine whether the table is Pipeline-fed or batch-loaded. Persist discovered namespace/table/columns to docs/cslb-schema.json and print them. All downstream tasks MUST use these real column names.
acceptance: docs/cslb-schema.json committed with real namespace, table, columns

tasks.title: R2 SQL client
tasks.description: queryR2SQL(env, sql): POST to R2 SQL endpoint with Bearer R2_SQL_TOKEN, body {query}, 180s timeout. Return {rows, schema, metrics, request_id}; surface success:false errors[] cleanly.
acceptance: successful SELECT returns typed rows + metrics
error responses are mapped, not thrown opaquely

tasks.title: Catalog client
tasks.description: List namespaces, list tables (return_details=true), get table metadata via Catalog REST. Handle nested-namespace %1F separator.
acceptance: namespaces and tables returned for the CSLB bucket

tasks.title: SODA permits client
tasks.description: Lookup by street_number+street_name, by permit_number, and a generic $where. Note: dataset has no contractor column.

tasks.title: Query guard
tasks.description: Validate/normalize SQL per r2_sql_guardrails: allow only SELECT/WITH/SHOW/DESCRIBE/EXPLAIN, reject DML/DDL, auto-inject LIMIT (default 500, cap 10000), block OFFSET and window functions with a clear error.

tasks.title: R2 SQL Hono routes
tasks.description: zod-openapi routes: POST /api/r2/query (guarded), GET /api/r2/namespaces, GET /api/r2/tables, GET /api/r2/describe?table=. Each has /health and logs to the D1 logging layer.
acceptance: arbitrary guarded query runs and returns rows+metrics

tasks.title: Permits Hono routes
tasks.description: POST /api/permits/lookup (by address or permit number) proxied to SODA, zod-openapi typed, /health, logged.
acceptance: address and permit-number lookups return live SODA data

tasks.title: NL to SQL
tasks.description: Provider/method using MODEL_DRAFT. System prompt embeds the discovered schema + guardrails + few-shot. Output SQL only; validate via guard + EXPLAIN before offering to run; surface SQL to user before execution.
acceptance: natural-language question yields valid, guardrail-compliant SQL grounded in real columns

tasks.title: Result interpretation
tasks.description: MODEL_CHAT. Given SQL + sampled rows + metrics, produce a short plain-language reading.
acceptance: returns a concise, accurate summary for a real result set

tasks.title: Anomaly detection
tasks.description: Cheap numeric checks (nulls, IQR/z-score outliers, cardinality shifts) plus MODEL_EXTRACT pass to flag/explain suspicious rows/columns. Also flag operational anomalies from query metrics (e.g. high files_scanned -> needs compaction).
acceptance: flags statistical outliers on a numeric column

tasks.title: Suggested next queries
tasks.description: MODEL_DRAFT. Given current query + schema, propose 3-5 follow-up queries as ready-to-run SQL with one-line rationales.
acceptance: returns 3-5 valid, runnable follow-up queries with rationales

tasks.title: Bind assistant-ui to ChatBroker
tasks.description: Wire the assistant-ui chat to the existing ChatBroker DO so conversation streams. Do not add new chat infra.

tasks.title: Agent tools
tasks.description: Expose tools to the agent: run_query, nl_to_sql, describe_schema, interpret_results, detect_anomalies, suggest_queries, lookup_permits, vet_contractor. Use WORKER_LOADERS for any dynamic/sandboxed execution. Agent can answer questions about a query, draft one or several queries, run them, and explain results.
acceptance: agent drafts + runs a query from a natural-language request
agent interprets the returned result set

tasks.title: Dashboard page
tasks.description: KPI cards (row count, freshness/last-load, bytes scanned last query) + recharts panels driven by real R2 SQL aggregates. Shared header, dark theme, responsive.
acceptance: cards + charts render live R2 SQL data, no placeholders

tasks.title: Query workbench island
tasks.description: SQL editor -> run -> results table (sort + filter) -> Interpret / Find anomalies / Suggested-next actions wired to Phase 2. Show metrics (files/bytes scanned, request_id). Suggested queries are clickable chips that populate the editor.

tasks.title: Assistant panel + shared context
tasks.description: Assistant-ui island bound to ChatBroker, sharing context with the workbench (agent 'run this' populates/executes the workbench; clicking a suggestion routes through the agent).
acceptance: asking the agent to run a query updates the workbench and shows results

tasks.title: Vetting tool
tasks.description: Launcher to pick a tool; selection opens a shadcn Dialog with required inputs and renders live results. (1) Contractor/Architect/Engineer: license and/or name (+optional city) -> CSLB R2 SQL (real columns) -> status/classifications/expiration/bond+WC flags if present. (2) Home address -> permits: street number+name (+unit) -> SODA -> permit history. (3) Permit number -> detail -> SODA. Small cross-link: offer to vet any contractor name appearing in an address's permit history against CSLB.
acceptance: all three modes open a modal and return live results
CSLB mode uses real discovered columns

tasks.title: Diagnostics endpoint
tasks.description: GET /api/diagnostics health rollup: catalog status (active?), compaction state, target table exists, COUNT(*), freshness, files_scanned/bytes_scanned from a probe. If Pipeline-fed (per P0-2), list pipelines and surface status + failure_reason. Interpret known beta gotchas in the response text (metrics lag 5-10 min, high file count -> compaction, ~5 min visibility delay).

tasks.title: Observability + health
tasks.description: Ensure every route/view emits structured logs/metrics to the mirrored D1 logging layer and exposes /health.
acceptance: logs land in D1 layer for each route

tasks.title: Lint, build, docs, deploy
tasks.description: pnpm lint + pnpm build green; fix type drift with cf-typegen. Update AGENTS.md (note Stitch/Jules deviation + new data-platform domain). Deploy via pnpm run deploy.

tasks.title: Final acceptance verification
tasks.description: Verify the full DoD against a live deployment.
acceptance: Arbitrary guarded read queries run with rows+metrics
NL->SQL, interpretation, anomaly detection, suggested-next all work on live data
assistant-ui bound to ChatBroker; agent drafts/runs/interprets queries via tools
Dashboard + workbench render real R2 SQL data with recharts + sortable/filterable table
Vetting tool: all three modes return live results (CSLB via R2 SQL, permits via SODA)
/api/diagnostics + /health report catalog/pipeline health; logs in D1 layer
OpenAPI live; deployed via pnpm run deploy; no mock data anywhere
